embeddings.text: Asphalt Shingle Roof GAF Asphalt Shingles 20-year lifespan 3-tab architectural shingle
Metal Roof Englert Metal Roofing 50-year lifespan standing seam steel panel
Flat Roof EPDM Firestone Flat Roofing 25-year rubber membrane 45-mil thickness
Copper Plumbing Mueller Supply Lines 1/2 inch type L copper 50-year lifespan
Gas Water Heater Rheem Water Heaters 40-gallon natural gas 12-year lifespan 40000 BTU
200A Electrical Panel Square D Electrical Panels 200 amp main breaker 40-space load center
Central Air Conditioner Carrier Cooling Systems 3-ton 16 SEER split system 15-year lifespan
Gas Furnace Lennox Heating Systems 80000 BTU 96% AFUE 20-year lifespan
Double-Pane Windows Andersen Windows Low-E argon-filled insulated glass 20-year lifespan
Sump Pump Zoeller Water Management 1/2 HP cast iron submersible 10-year lifespan
Missing Shingles severity:High causes:Wind damage age weathering
Roof Leak severity:High causes:Damaged flashing cracked shingles ice dam
Sagging Roof Deck severity:Critical causes:Water damage structural failure rot
Dripping Faucet severity:Low causes:Worn washer O-ring cartridge failure
Low Water Pressure severity:Medium causes:Mineral buildup faulty pressure regulator partial shutoff
No Hot Water severity:High causes:Failed heating element pilot light out tripped reset
Tripping Breaker severity:High causes:Overloaded circuit short circuit faulty appliance
Dead Outlet severity:Medium causes:Tripped GFCI faulty wiring loose connection
AC Not Cooling severity:High causes:Low refrigerant dirty coils failed capacitor
Furnace Not Heating severity:High causes:Faulty ignitor dirty filter cracked heat exchanger
Replacing Asphalt Shingles difficulty:Moderate time:2-3 hours steps:Secure the Work Area Remove Damaged Shingles Inspect and Repair Underlayment Install New Shingle Re-nail Overlying Shingles
Replacing Toilet Flapper difficulty:Easy time:15-30 minutes steps:Shut Off Water Supply Remove Tank Lid Remove Old Flapper Install New Flapper Test and Adjust

Circuit Breaker Replacement difficulty:Moderate time:30-60 minutes steps:Turn Off Main Breaker Remove Panel Cover Disconnect the Wire from Faulty Breaker Remove the Faulty Breaker Install the New Breaker Connect Wire and Restore Power
Refrigerator Start Relay Replacement difficulty:Easy time:30-45 minutes steps:Unplug and Access Compressor Locate the Start Relay Remove the Old Relay Test with Multimeter Install New Relay

AC Capacitor Replacement difficulty:Moderate time:30-45 minutes steps:Disconnect Power at Breaker Open Condenser Unit Panel Discharge Old Capacitor Safely Note and Disconnect Wires Install New Capacitor Restore Power and Test

Water Heater Anode Rod Replacement difficulty:Moderate time:45-60 minutes steps:Shut Off Water and Gas Relieve Tank Pressure Locate Anode Rod Port Remove Old Anode Rod Install New Anode Rod Restore Water and Check for Leaks
Window Weatherstrip Replacement difficulty:Easy time:20-40 minutes steps:Remove Old Weatherstrip Clean the Frame Channel Measure and Cut New Strip Press New Strip Into Channel Test Window Seal
Foundation Crack Sealing difficulty:Moderate time:1-2 hours steps:Clean and Dry the Crack Insert Injection Ports Seal Crack Surface Inject Epoxy or Polyurethane Allow to Cure Apply Waterproof Coating

Roof Flashing Re-Sealing difficulty:Moderate time:1-2 hours steps:Clean Around Flashing Remove Old Caulk and Sealant Inspect for Physical Damage Apply Roof Cement Under Lifted Edges Apply Lap Sealant Over Flashing Edges
GFCI Outlet Replacement difficulty:Easy time:20-30 minutes steps:Turn Off Circuit Breaker Verify Power Is Off Remove Old Outlet Connect New GFCI Outlet Install and Test GFCI
